shared_style.composition: chest-up, centered, consistent square crop, generous head and shoulder margin
shared_style.background: neutral institutional office with soft geometric panels and no readable text
shared_style.small_size_target: recognizable silhouette and role marker at 96px square
shared_style.grayscale_target: face, clothing, background, and role marker remain distinguishable without hue
shared_style.fallback: generic actor-family marker, role label, and written identity description

prohibited_content: protected logos, trademarks, institutional marks, or readable text
clinical diagnosis, severity, or treatment claim
hidden simulation state, score, intent, private action, or future outcome

roles.label: Rival system executive
roles.alt_text_guidance: Fictional rival health-system executive portrait; identity decoration only.
roles.fallback: Competitor actor marker with the written role label.
